outputs.patch.diff:
--- a/programs/tlf_ae_overview.R
+++ b/programs/tlf_ae_overview.R
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@
 
 # Filter population
 adsl <- adsl %>%
-  filter(ITTFL == "Y")
+  filter(SAFFL == "Y")
 
 # Merge ADSL with ADAE
 adae <- adae %>%
@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@
 # Count TEAE subjects and events
 teaes <- adae %>%
   filter(
-    TRTEMFL == "Y"
+    TRTEMFL == "Y"
   ) %>%
   group_by(TRTA) %>%
   summarise(
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@
 # Count distinct subjects for each event type
 teaes_distinct <- adae %>%
   filter(
-    TRTEMFL == "Y"
+    TRTEMFL == "Y"
   ) %>%
   group_by(TRTA, AEDECOD) %>%
   summarise(
@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@
 # Count total events (not distinct)
 total_events <- adae %>%
   filter(
-    TRTEMFL == "Y"
+    TRTEMFL == "Y"
   ) %>%
   group_by(TRTA) %>%
   summarise(
@@ -50,7 +50,7 @@

 any_ae_subjects <- adae %>%
   filter(
-    TRTEMFL == "Y"
+    TRTEMFL == "Y"
   ) %>%
   group_by(TRTA) %>%
   summarise(
@@ -60,7 +60,7 @@

-    TRTEMFL == "Y",
+    TRTEMFL == "Y",
     AESER == "Y"

   group_by(TRTA) %>%
@@ -70,7 +70,7 @@

   ) %>%
   group_by(TRTA) %>%
@@ -90,7 +90,7 @@
